notes.title: Single Phase A.C Series Circuits
notes.summary: Sinusoidal Quantities: Instantaneous, Peak, Average and effective value, Form Factor. R, L, C and R-L series circuit. Draw phasor diagram.

notes.title: Single Phase A.C Parallel Circuits
notes.summary: R-L and R-L-C parallel combination of A.C circuits. Resonance in series and parallel circuits. Draw phasor diagram.

notes.title: Three Phase Circuits
notes.summary: Concept of generation of 3-phase alternating voltage. Draw phasor diagram. Advantages of 3-phase system over single phase system. Delta and Star connections.

notes.title: Network Reduction and Principles of Circuits Analysis
notes.summary: Concept of voltage and current sources. Delta-star and star-delta transformations. Thevenin's theorem, Norton's theorem. Maximum power Transfer theorem.

notes.title: Network Theorems
notes.summary: Superposition theorem, Thevenin's theorem, Norton's theorem. Maximum load resistance to create resonance in given R-L series P arallel or by using variable inductor or variable capacitor.

practicals.title: Use voltmeter, ammeter, wattmeter to determine active, reactive and apparent power consumed in given R-L series circuit. Draw phasor diagram.
practicals.description: Hands-on experiment to measure electrical parameters in R-L series circuits and understand power relationships.

practicals.title: Use voltmeter, ammeter, to determine active, reactive and apparent power consumed in given R-C series circuit. Draw phasor diagram.
practicals.description: Measurement and analysis of power in R-C circuits with phasor representation.

practicals.title: Use voltmeter, ammeter, wattmeter to determine active, reactive and apparent power consumed in given R-L-C series circuit. Draw phasor diagram.
practicals.description: Complete analysis of RLC series circuits including resonance conditions.

practicals.title: Use voltmeter, ammeter to determine equivalent circuit parameter in given R-L Parallel circuit. Draw phasor diagram.
practicals.description: Understanding parallel circuit behavior and parameter calculation.

practicals.title: Use variable frequency supply to create resonance in given series R-L-C circuit or by using variable inductor or variable capacitor.
practicals.description: Experimental study of resonance phenomenon in RLC circuits.

videos.title: AC Circuit Analysis - Complete Tutorial
videos.description: Comprehensive video covering AC circuit fundamentals, phasor diagrams, and power calculations.

videos.title: Three Phase Circuits Explained
videos.description: Detailed explanation of three-phase systems, star-delta connections, and balanced loads.

videos.title: Network Theorems - Thevenin & Norton
videos.description: Step-by-step guide to applying Thevenin's and Norton's theorems with solved examples.

videos.title: Resonance in AC Circuits
videos.description: Understanding series and parallel resonance with practical demonstrations.
